name: takeoff-lens
description: Local AI drawing intelligence for reviewed, traceable quantity takeoff.

interface.shortDescription: Turn drawings into reviewed, traceable quantities.
interface.longDescription: Read engineering drawings, detect discipline-specific symbols, review every candidate, and export traceable quantity evidence. Electrical and ELV workflows are available first, with a shared core designed for additional building systems.
defaultPrompt: Audit this engineering drawing with traceable evidence.
Count supported systems by floor and create markup.
Show supported and planned TakeoffLens disciplines.
